description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages syntax_check, build, deploy, test, and release using Docker runners tagged docker. In the syntax_check stage add a check_playbooks job that uses the registry.gitlab.com/chusiang/continuous-delivery-workshop/ansible:2.5.3 image, runs `ls`, `cd ansible-playbooks/`, `echo "${VAULT_KEY}" > secret.txt`, `make main`, and `rm -f secret.txt`. In the build stage add a build_binary job that uses the registry.gitlab.com/chusiang/continuous-delivery-workshop/ubuntu:16.04 image, runs `chmod 755 penguin-htdocs/DEBIAN` and `dpkg -b penguin-htdocs`, and stores the resulting penguin-htdocs.deb as an artifact retained for one week. In the deploy stage add a deploy_to_dev job limited to the master, develop branches or tags, that uses the same ansible image, runs `ls`, `cd ansible-playbooks/`, `echo "${VAULT_KEY}" > secret.txt`, `ansible-playbook deploy.yml`, and `rm -f secret.txt`, and sets the staging environment with URL http://stg.cdws.drx.tw. In the test stage add a test_dev job limited to the same refs, using the ansible image, that runs `cd ansible-playbooks/`, `echo "${VAULT_KEY}" > secret.txt`, `ansible-playbook test.yml`, and `rm -f secret.txt`, targeting the staging environment at http://stg.cdws.drx.tw:10080. Finally, in the release stage add a release_to_prd job limited to master or tags, using the ansible image, that runs `cd ansible-playbooks/`, `echo "${VAULT_KEY}" > secret.txt`, `ansible-playbook -i production deploy.yml`, and `rm -f secret.txt`, and deploys to the production environment at http://cdws.drx.tw.
